info.title: Jobbers OneAPI
info.description: The Jobbers One API provides REST endpoints for enterprise concierge services management including authentication, client management, enterprise statistics, pass management, conversations, messaging, webhooks, box tags, and client location management.

post.description: Authenticate using API key and secret key to receive an access token.

get.description: Retrieve information about the entity associated with the current access token.
Test endpoint that echoes the input text.

post.description: Test endpoint that echoes posted text.

get.description: Retrieve the groups of the enterprise being authenticated.
Get usage statistics of the enterprise for a given month and year.
Get the stock of passes available for the authenticated enterprise.

post.description: Assign a pass from a stock to a given client.

get.description: Check whether a given email exists as a registered client.
Get all data of a client by ID or email.

post.description: Update an existing client by ID or email.

delete.description: Delete an existing client by ID or email.

post.description: Create a new client belonging to the authenticated enterprise.

200.description: Created client data with generated password

get.description: Get a one-time login token for a client to auto-login to Jobbers.

post.description: Create a new conversation for a client.

get.description: Get conversations of a client by client_id and status.

put.description: Update subject, status, or rating of a conversation.

post.description: Create a new message in a conversation.

get.description: Get all messages of a conversation.

post.description: Upload a file and get its URL for use in messages.
Create a new webhook for message notifications.

get.description: Get webhooks for message notifications for the enterprise.

post.description: Create a new relationship between a client and a box location.

delete.description: Delete a relationship between a client and a box location.

post.description: Create a new webhook for box notifications.

get.description: Get box webhooks for the enterprise.

delete.description: Delete a box webhook by ID.

bearerAuth.description: OAuth2 Bearer token obtained from the authentication endpoint

title.description: Error type: cannot_be_blank, has_already_been_taken, must_be_accepted, is_invalid, does_not_match, cannot_be_empty

payment_reference.description: Unique external ID for this transaction
